cmd: bash -c ls .github/workflows/ && cat .github/workflows/release.yml 2>/dev/null | head -60; git log --oneline main..fix-overlap; git status --short | head; grep -m2 version Cargo.toml crates/ctx2img-cli/Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null
summary:
ci.yml
release.yml
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags: ["v*"]

permissions:
  contents: write

env:
  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always

jobs:
  build:
    name: build (${{ matrix.target }})
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
          - os: macos-13
            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
          - os: macos-latest
            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
          - os: windows-latest
            target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
      - name: Build
        run: cargo build --release -p ctx2img-cli --target ${{ matrix.target }}
      - name: Package (unix)
        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
        run: |
          staging="ctx2img-${{ github.ref_name }}-${{ matrix.target }}"
          mkdir -p "$staging"
          cp "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/ctx2img" "$staging/"
          cp README.md LICENSE "$staging/"
          cp -r skills "$staging/skills"
          tar czf "$staging.tar.gz" "$staging"
          echo "ASSET=$staging.tar.gz" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
      - name: Package (windows)
        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $staging = "ctx2img-${{ github.ref_name }}-${{ matrix.target }}"
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $staging | Out-Null
          Copy-Item "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/ctx2img.exe" $staging/
          Copy-Item README.md,LICENSE $staging/
          Copy-Item -Recurse skills "$staging/skills"
          Compress-Archive -Path $staging -DestinationPath "$staging.zip"
          echo "ASSET=$staging.zip" | Out-File -FilePath $env:GITHUB_ENV -Append
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ matrix.target }}
710e95e Shrink section-map pages to their content: no more white-padded boxes
80d9fe3 Apply rustfmt to handle-only label position
928af88 Never paint cell text over neighboring boxes in section maps
Cargo.toml:version = "0.1.0"
Cargo.toml:serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
crates/ctx2img-cli/Cargo.toml:version.workspace = true

Gap found: this dev machine is linux-aarch64 (WSL2 on ARM) - no prebuilt binary for it; ubuntu-24.04-arm runner could add aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu in v0.1.1." && h5i share push 2>&1 | tail -1
